title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: Do you like spending time in nature? What do you enjoy most about it?
Are there any endangered animals that you feel particularly concerned about?
Do you think more should be done to protect wildlife habitats?
Have you ever been on a nature walk or wildlife watch? Did you enjoy it?
How important are green spaces in your city or town?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think wild animals should ever be kept in zoos?
What can ordinary people do to help protect wildlife?
Do you think we value the natural world less because we spend less time in it?
